title: rig configuration
description: Per-repo configuration for rig (.rig.json). Shared keys (the same across the .NET and Node rig) live at the top level; .NET-only settings go under "dotnet". Everything is optional; rig is convention-first and falls back to discovery.

defaultProject.description: Project run by `rig run` with no argument.

exclude.description: Glob patterns (matched on project name or relative path) for projects rig ignores — keeps demos/spikes/benchmarks out of the pickers.

quiet.description: Suppress the `→ command` echo (same as passing --quiet).

env.description: Environment variables applied to every spawned command.

envPresets.description: Named env bundles applied by a matching flag (e.g. `rig test --log`).

commands.description: Custom verbs. Each value is a shell string, an argv array, or an object.

aliases.description: Verb name → curated short alias, overriding the built-in default (e.g. { "coverage": "c" }).

match.description: Command-line substring patterns to terminate (matched against the full process command line: pkill -f on Unix, CIM CommandLine on Windows). Overrides the default 'all runnable projects' sweep.

coverage.description: Shared coverage options (open/full/min). .NET-only knobs (settings/collector/license) now live under `dotnet.coverage`.

open.description: Always open the report after `rig coverage` (same as passing --open).

full.description: Default to the full multi-file report (same as passing --full).

min.description: Default minimum line-coverage % gate (same as --min); the CLI flag overrides.

settings.description: Deprecated: use dotnet.coverage.settings. Coverage runsettings path.

license.description: Deprecated: use dotnet.coverage.license. ReportGenerator Pro key.

dotnet.description: Settings specific to the .NET rig (ignored by the Node rig).

solution.description: Path to the solution (.slnx/.sln) to use, overriding auto-discovery.

defaultProject.description: Default project for .NET specifically; overrides the top-level defaultProject.

node.description: Reserved for Node-specific settings (ignored by the .NET rig).

test.description: Deprecated: project → dotnet.test.project; envPresets → top-level envPresets.

project.description: Test project path/glob, overriding auto-detection when ambiguous.

collector.description: Coverage collection mechanism; 'auto' detects the test runner.

license.description: ReportGenerator Pro key, forwarded to the REPORTGENERATOR_LICENSE env var.

skip.description: Paths/globs to skip when nuking bin/obj.

configuration.description: Build configuration (default Release); the --configuration flag overrides.
